description: Create a navigable case management manual using the document at /home/ga/Documents/case_manual_draft.docx. Insert bookmarks at the start of each of the eight chapter headings. Add a new page at the beginning of the document titled 'Quick Navigation' containing a list of the eight chapter titles. Each title on the 'Quick Navigation' page must be an internal hyperlink pointing to its corresponding chapter bookmark. Save the final document to /home/ga/Documents/case_manual_navigable.docx.
